pi_items.source: Cross-reference with NinjaTrader 8 standard directory structure from other tasks (create_reusable_chart_template uses same base path)
Explicit requirement in task.json description: 'Export an image of the chart as a PNG file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\SPY_Report.png'
ARGB hex color format where FF=full opacity and FFFFFF=white RGB (255,255,255). Verified via web search that #FFFFFF is white. Task description requires white background.

Web search verification: #DAA520 is goldenrod (https://www.colorhexa.com/daa520), #FFFF00 is yellow (https://www.colorhexa.com/ffff00), #FFD700 is gold (https://www.colorhexa.com/ffd700). ARGB format adds FF alpha channel for opacity. Task requires dark blue for visibility on white background, making yellow/gold forbidden.
Explicit requirement in task.json description: 'Add an SMA (Simple Moving Average) indicator with Period 50'

Discrepancy detected: SPY.Last.txt shows Dec 31, 2024 close of 586.08, but web search results indicate official market close was 579.27 (1.2% difference). Data file format (semicolon-separated OHLCV) matches Yahoo Finance export, but price values don't match verified historical closing prices. Data is 502 daily records from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31.

privileged_info_summary: All five task metadata claims (template_path, image_path, expected_background, forbidden_sma_colors, required_sma_period) are verified as correct and consistent with task requirements. The template will be saved to NinjaTrader's standard Chart templates directory with name 'PrintReady'. The chart image must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\SPY_Report.png. The background must be pure white (#FFFFFF with full opacity). The SMA indicator must use period 50 and must NOT use yellow/gold colors (forbidden: Goldenrod #FFDAA520, Yellow #FFFFFF00, Gold #FFFFD700) to ensure visibility on white background. However, the SPY price data provided in the environment (SPY.Last.txt) is synthetic or adjusted, not authentic Yahoo Finance data, as evidenced by price discrepancies at known dates (e.g., Dec 31, 2024).
